title: hebe × rotundata
intro: Hebe × rotundata, also known as the Pink Ice Plant, is a hybrid of the Hebe genus, specifically a cross between Hebe salicorniifolia and Hebe speciosa. This shrubby perennial plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hebe × rotundata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
